observations: The failure indicates a visibility or locator mismatch.

Captured notes: Deliberate healer proposal fixture for missing selector.
Viewport: 1280x900
Wait until: domcontentloaded
Capture error: Selector was not visible: text=Definitely Missing Ariadne Healer Fixture

proposedActions.title: Repair locator or accessibility contract
proposedActions.rationale: The captured evidence reports that the expected selector was not visible.
suggestedFiles: playwright spec or UI component owning the missing text/role
proposedActions.reviewGate: A reviewer must confirm the selector matches user-visible behavior rather than hiding the failure.

reviewGates: Inspect the screenshot and trace before editing application code.
Keep generated repairs in a bounded branch and review the diff.
Rerun the failing Playwright capture or test before accepting the repair.
Record new Playwright evidence and CodeRabbit or human review before merge.

requiredGates: Human review accepts the healer proposal and target files.
An explicit approval request is approved for the bounded repair.
A generic mutation-readiness plan binds the repair command, rollback, and post-verification command.
Mutation execution is invoked only with an exact --confirm-plan match.
Fresh Playwright evidence passes after execution.

nextCommands.approvalRequest: npm run ariadne -- approval-request --project ariadne --by <operator> --target generic --action 'Approve bounded healer repair for playwright-2026-05-16T14-29-04-701Z' --risk medium --reason 'Repair failed Playwright evidence playwright-2026-05-16T14-29-04-701Z for file://<VAULT_ROOT>/projects/ariadne/console/index.html' --rollback 'Revert the repair branch or restore the prior UI/test files.' --evidence projects/ariadne/verification/playwright-2026-05-16T14-29-04-701Z.json
nextCommands.mutationPlan: npm run ariadne -- mutation-readiness --project ariadne --target generic --scope 'Repair failed Playwright evidence playwright-2026-05-16T14-29-04-701Z for file://<VAULT_ROOT>/projects/ariadne/console/index.html' --auth-evidence control/approvals/approval-...json --dry-run 'npm run check && npm test' --live-command '<bounded repair command or reviewed patch application>' --post-verify 'npm run ariadne -- playwright-capture --project ariadne --target-url '\''file://<VAULT_ROOT>/projects/ariadne/console/index.html'\''' --rollback 'Revert the repair branch or restore the prior UI/test files.' --approval approval-...
nextCommands.dryRun: npm run ariadne -- mutation-dry-run --project ariadne --plan mutation-readiness-generic-...
nextCommands.execute: npm run ariadne -- mutation-execute --project ariadne --plan mutation-readiness-generic-... --confirm-plan mutation-readiness-generic-...

notes: Review-only proposal generated from deliberate missing-selector evidence.
